# B&B Locksmith & Security Inc.

> Licensed Bay Area locksmith and commercial security company. C-28 licensed contractor, bonded and insured. Serving the San Francisco Bay Area since 2009, dispatched from Walnut Creek, CA with 24/7 emergency response and an average ETA under 30 minutes.

## Contact
- Phone (SF / primary CTA): 415-423-0182
- Phone (East Bay / text): 925-266-3393
- Email: office@blocksmithpro.com
- Address: 1449 SOS Drive, Walnut Creek, CA 94597
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8:00am-6:00pm, Sat 9:00am-3:00pm, 24/7 emergency line

## Service Area
San Francisco, San Jose, Fremont, Walnut Creek, Oakland, Berkeley, Concord, San Ramon, Dublin, Pleasanton, Livermore, Richmond — the greater San Francisco Bay Area.

## Services
- [Emergency Locksmith](https://blocksmithpro.com/emergency-locksmith-bay-area): 24/7 home, business, and car lockouts, broken key extraction, post-break-in rekeying
- [Commercial Locksmith](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/commercial-locksmith): master key systems, panic bars, storefront hardware, access control
- [Residential Locksmith](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/residential-locksmith): lock installation, rekeying, deadbolt upgrades, smart locks
- [Automotive Locksmith](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/automotive-locksmith): transponder keys, fob programming, car lockouts
- [Access Control](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/access-control): keycard, biometric, and cloud-managed systems
- [Smart Locks](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/smart-locks): August, Yale, Schlage, Kwikset installation and support
- [Safe Installation & Opening](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/safe-installation)
- [Intercom Systems](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/intercom-systems)
- [Keyless Entry](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/keyless-entry)
- [Commercial Doors](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/commercial-doors)
- [Commercial Locking Hardware](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/commercial-locking-hardware)
- [Security Consulting](https://blocksmithpro.com/services/security-consulting)

## Locations
- [San Francisco](https://blocksmithpro.com/locations/san-francisco)
- [San Jose](https://blocksmithpro.com/locations/san-jose)
- [Fremont](https://blocksmithpro.com/locations/fremont)

## About
- [About the company](https://blocksmithpro.com/about): family-run, founded 2009, led by Alex Berger
- Reviews: 5.0-star rated on Yelp and Google
- Technology partners include ProdataKey, Verkada, ASSA ABLOY, Schlage, Yale, Medeco
